seeds.title: When I Feel Angry
seeds.prompt: A child who feels very angry and learns to calm down by taking deep breaths and talking about feelings

seeds.title: It Is Okay to Cry
seeds.prompt: A child who feels sad and learns that it is perfectly fine to cry and that feelings always get better

seeds.title: When I Feel Worried
seeds.prompt: A child who feels anxious and scared about something new and learns that talking to someone kind always helps

seeds.title: When Things Are Not Fair
seeds.prompt: A child who feels jealous when a friend gets something they want, and learns to be happy for others

seeds.title: I Miss You So Much
seeds.prompt: A child who misses grandma very much and learns that love keeps us close even when people are far away

seeds.title: When I Made a Mistake
seeds.prompt: A child who makes a mistake and feels bad, and learns that saying sorry and trying again is what matters

seeds.title: When I Feel Left Out
seeds.prompt: A child who feels left out when friends play without them, and finds the courage to join in gently

seeds.title: The Dark Is Okay
seeds.prompt: A child who is afraid of the dark at bedtime and learns that nighttime is safe, cozy, and full of rest

seeds.title: When I Am Disappointed
seeds.prompt: A child who is very disappointed when plans change, and learns that new plans can bring new surprises

seeds.title: I Feel So Embarrassed
seeds.prompt: A child who feels embarrassed after a small mishap, and learns that everyone makes funny mistakes sometimes

seeds.title: When I Feel Sick
seeds.prompt: A child who feels poorly and a little scared, and learns that rest, kindness, and warm soup make everything better

seeds.title: I Cannot Wait
seeds.prompt: A child who feels very impatient waiting for something exciting, and learns that good things are worth waiting for

seeds.title: Too Many Feelings
seeds.prompt: A child who feels overwhelmed and does not understand all their big feelings at once, and learns to slow down and breathe

seeds.title: Sharing Feels Good
seeds.prompt: A child who does not want to share at first but discovers that sharing brings more happiness than keeping things alone

seeds.title: Worried at Bedtime
seeds.prompt: A child who lies awake with worried thoughts and learns a gentle breathing trick to let worries float away like clouds

seeds.title: Painting Day
seeds.prompt: A child who paints a big colorful picture at kindergarten and proudly shows the teacher

seeds.title: The Puzzle Friends
seeds.prompt: Two kindergarten friends who work together to finish a giant floor puzzle

seeds.title: Snack Time
seeds.prompt: A child who happily shares apple slices with new friends at snack time

seeds.title: The Music Circle
seeds.prompt: A class of little ones who sing and clap together in a happy morning music circle

seeds.title: The Lost Teddy
seeds.prompt: A child who kindly helps a friend find a teddy bear left behind at kindergarten

seeds.title: The Tiny Seed
seeds.prompt: A class who plant little seeds in cups and watch them grow on the sunny windowsill

seeds.title: Taking Turns
seeds.prompt: A child who learns the happy joy of taking turns on the kindergarten slide

seeds.title: Story Corner
seeds.prompt: Little ones who gather on a soft rug for a cozy story with their gentle teacher

seeds.title: My Own Name
seeds.prompt: A shy child who learns to write their very own name for the first time

seeds.title: The Class Party
seeds.prompt: A kindergarten class who decorate the room together for a gentle little celebration

seeds.title: Bubbly Hands
seeds.prompt: A child who discovers the splashy, bubbly fun of washing hands before lunch

seeds.title: Dress-Up Day
seeds.prompt: Children who play dress-up and become gentle, kind little heroes for an afternoon

seeds.title: The Garden Visitor
seeds.prompt: A class who gently watch a little caterpillar visit their play garden

seeds.title: Nap Time
seeds.prompt: A child who settles down for a calm, cozy nap on a soft mat at kindergarten

seeds.title: See You Tomorrow

seeds.title: The Friendly Match
seeds.prompt: Children who play a gentle game of ball together on the soft green grass

seeds.title: The Big Slide
seeds.prompt: A child who makes a new friend at the top of the tallest, fastest slide

seeds.title: Flying a Kite
seeds.prompt: Two friends who fly a colorful kite together on a gentle breezy afternoon

seeds.title: The Cartwheel
seeds.prompt: A child who cheers on a friend learning to tumble softly on the grass

seeds.title: Feeding the Ducks
seeds.prompt: Children who toss gentle crumbs to happy ducks at the calm park pond

seeds.title: The Flower Crown
seeds.prompt: Friends who weave a pretty crown of daisies together in a sunny meadow

seeds.title: The Shared Picnic
seeds.prompt: Children who share a cozy picnic blanket and kindly trade tasty treats

seeds.title: The Gentle Race
seeds.prompt: Little ones who run a giggly, friendly race to the big old oak tree

seeds.title: Chasing Bubbles

seeds.title: The Little Squirrel
seeds.prompt: Friends who quietly watch a playful squirrel gather acorns in the trees

seeds.title: Learning to Roll
seeds.prompt: A child who holds a friend's hand while learning to roll gently along the path

seeds.title: The Sandbox Castle
seeds.prompt: Friends who build a grand, gentle sandcastle together in the park sandbox

seeds.title: The Carousel
seeds.prompt: Children who ride a gentle carousel round and round on a happy afternoon

seeds.title: After the Rain
seeds.prompt: Friends who softly splash in little puddles and spot a rainbow together

seeds.title: The Clapping Game

seeds.title: Baking Cookies
seeds.prompt: A child who bakes warm, sweet cookies with family on a cozy afternoon

seeds.title: Game Night
seeds.prompt: A family who gather for a gentle, giggly board game evening together

seeds.title: Backyard Camp
seeds.prompt: A family who pitch a little tent and tell soft stories in the backyard

seeds.title: Movie Night
seeds.prompt: A child who snuggles under a soft blanket for a cozy family movie night

seeds.title: Gardening Together
seeds.prompt: A child who plants bright, cheerful flowers with grandma in the garden

seeds.title: Making Soup
seeds.prompt: A family who stir a warm, tasty pot of soup together on a chilly day

seeds.title: Grandpa's Story
seeds.prompt: A child who listens to a gentle tale from grandpa by the sunny window

seeds.title: By the Fire
seeds.prompt: A child who learns to wind soft yarn beside a warm, crackling fireplace

seeds.title: The Sunday Drive
seeds.prompt: A family who take a calm, happy drive to see the rolling green hills

seeds.title: The Family Cat
seeds.prompt: A child and family who lovingly care for a soft, sleepy family cat

seeds.title: Grandma's Birthday
seeds.prompt: A family who surprise grandma with a gentle, warm birthday tea

seeds.title: The Tidy-Up Song
seeds.prompt: A family who sing a happy song while tidying the cozy house together

seeds.title: Pancake Morning
seeds.prompt: A child who flips fluffy pancakes with dad on a slow, sunny Sunday morning

seeds.title: Goodnight Hugs
seeds.prompt: A child who gives warm goodnight hugs to everyone in the family

seeds.title: The Photo Album
seeds.prompt: A family who look through a warm album of happy memories together

seeds.title: Bath Time
seeds.prompt: A child who has to stop playing and take a bath before bed, even though they are not ready to stop, and discovers that bath time can actually be fun

seeds.title: Clean Teeth
seeds.prompt: A child who feels too tired to brush their teeth before bed but learns why clean teeth matter, and finds a way to make brushing feel like less of a chore

seeds.title: Where Is Bear?
seeds.prompt: A child who cannot find their beloved stuffed bear at bedtime and the whole family helps search the house until it turns up in a funny hiding place

seeds.title: One More Hug
seeds.prompt: A child who keeps coming back downstairs for one more hug, one more drink of water, and one more question, and mum gently helps them settle for the night

seeds.title: My Night Light
seeds.prompt: A child who feels a little nervous going to sleep in the dark and gets to choose their very first night light, which makes bedtime feel much cosier

seeds.title: Too Excited to Sleep
seeds.prompt: A child who cannot stop wriggling in bed the night before their birthday because they are so excited, and slowly learns to calm down and rest

seeds.title: The Loud Thunder
seeds.prompt: A child who is woken by a thunderstorm and feels scared, and mum explains what thunder is while they snuggle up safe together until the storm passes

seeds.title: My Big Kid Bed
seeds.prompt: A child who moves from their cot to their very first big-kid bed and feels proud but also a tiny bit wobbly about the change

seeds.title: After a Bad Dream
seeds.prompt: A child who has a frightening dream and calls for dad, who comes straight away and gently explains that dreams are not real and helps them feel safe again

seeds.title: Sleeping at Grandma's
seeds.prompt: A child who sleeps at grandma's house for the very first time with their own pillow from home, and realises that grandma's house is actually very cosy

seeds.title: Too Early!
seeds.prompt: A child who wakes up when it is still dark outside and wants to get up but learns that everyone needs to rest a little longer, and finds quiet ways to wait

seeds.title: My Bedtime Routine
seeds.prompt: A child who does their whole bedtime routine completely by themselves for the very first time: bath, teeth, pyjamas, and story, feeling very grown-up at the end

seeds.title: Pyjama Night
seeds.prompt: A child who gets to choose their favourite pyjamas and accidentally puts them on inside-out, making the whole family laugh at bedtime

seeds.title: Goodnight Everyone
seeds.prompt: A child who says a very thorough goodnight to every person, every toy, and every corner of their room before they can finally settle down to sleep

seeds.title: The Dog on the Bed
seeds.prompt: A child who quietly lets the family dog sneak onto the bed for company at night and wonders if mum and dad will notice in the morning

seeds.title: The Picnic Plan
seeds.prompt: Three friends who plan a garden picnic together and chat about what each one will bring

seeds.title: The Little Boat
seeds.prompt: Two friends and a friendly duck who chat together while sailing a toy boat across a pond

seeds.title: Teddy's Tea Party
seeds.prompt: A child whose teddy bear and rabbit toy come alive for a cozy tea party and chat politely about cakes

seeds.title: The Backyard Show
seeds.prompt: Three friends who put on a little backyard talent show and cheer for each other

seeds.title: The Lost Acorn
seeds.prompt: A squirrel and a wise old owl and a small bird who talk together to find a lost acorn

seeds.title: The Baking Team
seeds.prompt: A child and grandma and a cheeky talking cat who chat while baking cookies together

seeds.title: The Toy Train Trip
seeds.prompt: Toy passengers who chat about the sights as their little train rides around the playroom

seeds.title: After the Rain
seeds.prompt: Two friends and a garden snail who talk about the rainbow after warm summer rain

seeds.title: The Pillow Castle
seeds.prompt: Three siblings who build a pillow castle and chat about who guards which tower

seeds.title: The Aquarium Visit
seeds.prompt: Two friends visiting an aquarium who imagine the fish chatting back to them

seeds.title: The Garden Friends
seeds.prompt: A ladybug and a bee and a butterfly who chat while helping the garden flowers

seeds.title: The Balloon Ride
seeds.prompt: A child and a gentle talking fox who imagine floating over town in a balloon and describe what they see to each other

seeds.title: The Morning Walk
seeds.prompt: A child and grandpa and a bouncy puppy who chat and greet the neighbours on a gentle sunny morning walk

seeds.title: The Toy Rocket
seeds.prompt: Three toy astronauts who chat excitedly about the planets they pass as they blast off on a playroom adventure

seeds.title: The Puppet Show
seeds.prompt: A child who puts on a little puppet show for their toys and gives each puppet a different funny voice for the audience

seeds.title: Dentist
seeds.prompt: a reassuring story where a little hero visits the dentist, feels a bit nervous in the big chair, is gently helped, and leaves proud with a sparkling smile

seeds.title: Doctor visit
seeds.prompt: a gentle story where a little hero gets a quick check-up and a tiny vaccine, squeezes a grown-up's hand, and feels brave and fine right after

seeds.title: Kindergarten
seeds.prompt: a warm story where a little hero spends a day at kindergarten, misses home a little, plays with a friend, and can't wait to go back tomorrow

seeds.title: Birthday party
seeds.prompt: a joyful story where a little hero feels a little shy walking into a birthday party, but sings, plays games, and has the most wonderful time

seeds.title: Haircut
seeds.prompt: a playful story where a little hero gets a haircut, hears the funny snip-snip sounds, and loves how they look after

seeds.title: Airplane
seeds.prompt: a cozy story where a little hero takes an airplane ride, watches the clouds go by, and lands happy with popping ears and a big smile

seeds.title: Car trip
seeds.prompt: a cheerful story where a little hero feels restless on a long car ride, plays fun games along the way, and arrives happy and excited

seeds.title: Sleepover
seeds.prompt: a snug story where a little hero sleeps over at grandma's, feels a flutter of missing home, and wakes up proud and happy
